rulings.Case Title: FREDERICK SPENCER III VS. SEQUOIA VENTURES INC.
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion For Relief From And Setting Aside The Courts Order Striking Defendant Park Mechanical, Inc.S Answer And Subsequent Default And Default Judgment Taken Against Defendant Park Mechanical, Inc.
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Law and Motion Calendar for October 19, 2016, Wednesday, in Department 503, Line 1. Defendant Park Mechanical, Inc.'s motion for relief from and setting aside the Court's order striking defendant Park Mechanical, Inc.'s answer and subsequent default and default judgment taken against defendant Park Mechanical, Inc. is off calendar pursuant to the October 14, 2016 stipulation and order to set aside default of Park Mechanical, Inc. and setting aside default judgment entered. = (503/GLW)
